summary: End-to-end validation of new module 'De Dentro Pra Fora' (Endomarketing) — backend + frontend + LLM generation + PDF export + sidebar/CommandPalette wiring + AbortController regression on Reports/History/Touchpoints/Campaigns. All flows pass.

issues: Radix Console warning: `DialogContent` requires a `DialogTitle` for screen reader accessibility. Wrap with VisuallyHidden component. Non-blocking but should be fixed for a11y compliance.

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login (admin@labrand.com.br) → 200 + token
GET /api/endomarketing/questions → 200, 18 questions, 6 pillars, 3 questions each
GET /api/endomarketing/diagnosis/{brand_id} (existing) → 200, _id stripped, scores present
GET /api/endomarketing/diagnosis/{unknown} → 404
POST /api/endomarketing/diagnosis (empty respostas) → 400
POST /api/endomarketing/diagnosis (full 18 answers=4) → 200, scores=100/100, nivel=Marca Viva, persisted on GET
POST /api/endomarketing/generate/{brand_id} → 200 in ~20s, plano_endomarketing + temporada_gamificada keys present
GET /api/endomarketing/export-pdf/{brand_id} → 200, content-type=application/pdf, valid PDF magic bytes (%PDF)
GET /api/endomarketing/export-pdf/{unknown} → 404
Auth required on /api/endomarketing/questions (no token) → 401/403
Regression: GET /api/reports/history?brand_id=... OK
Regression: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/touchpoints OK
Regression: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/campaigns OK
Frontend: /endomarketing route loads, [data-testid=endomarketing-page] visible
Frontend: 4 tabs (tab-diagnostico, tab-score, tab-plano, tab-temporada) all rendered
Frontend: 6 pilar-section blocks rendered (engajamento, meritocracia, alta_performance, resultados, economia, pertencimento)
Frontend: Likert scale shows 5 options per question (q{i}-0..q{i}-4 → values 0=Nunca .. 4=Sempre)
Frontend: diagnostic-progress bar present
Frontend: save-diagnostic-btn present
Frontend: Score tab → score-radar (Recharts), maturity-badge='Marca Viva', 6 pilar-score-* cards
Frontend: Plano tab → filled state (existing data), plan-export-pdf button present
Frontend: Temporada tab → filled state with KPIs, narrativa, competição, palco, comunidade, mecânica, cronograma; temporada-export-pdf button present
Frontend: Sidebar item 'De Dentro Pra Fora' under Diagnóstico section with 'Novo' badge visible
Frontend: Command Palette (Cmd+K) opens, search 'De Dentro' filters to 1 cmdk-item, click navigates to /endomarketing
Regression UI: /reports, /history, /touchpoints, /campaigns all load without crash after AbortController refactor
Regression UI: Fast page-hop simulation (3x cycles across reports→touchpoints→campaigns) completes without unhandled errors
action_items: (Low priority) Add DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) to all Radix DialogContent used by CommandPalette and other dialogs to silence the a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: endomarketing.py route file is well-structured (~450 lines): static questionnaire, score computation, idempotent upsert, LLM generation with JSON-fence-tolerant parsing, ReportLab PDF builder.
_strip_id helper correctly excludes MongoDB _id from all responses.
LLM error handling returns 502 with detail messages — frontend should surface via toast (verified empty/filled state UI handles both paths).

Endomarketing.js (622 lines) is borderline of the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into <DiagnosticTab/>, <ScoreTab/>, <PlanoTab/>, <TemporadaTab/> sub-components if it grows further (already partially structured as inner components).
AbortController pattern applied consistently across Reports.js, BrandHistory.js, Touchpoints.js, Campaigns.js — no race conditions observed under fast brand/page switches.

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 endpoint tests passed, 1 skipped for unmatched history endpoint variant; LLM generate validated separately at ~20s)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all data-testid elements present, 4 tabs working, Score radar + maturity badge OK, Plano + Temporada filled, sidebar + command palette navigation OK)

seed_data_creation: test_save_diagnosis_full overwrote the existing 'Marca Demo' diagnosis with respostas=4 (all answers=Sempre, score=100). LLM generate then re-populated plano + temporada. Original answers were not preserved — main agent should be aware if the demo data needs restoration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Endomarketing module fully validated end-to-end: backend (questions/diagnosis CRUD, LLM generate ~20s, PDF export), frontend (4 tabs with all data-testids, Recharts radar, sidebar + command palette wiring), and AbortController refactor regression on Reports/History/Touchpoints/Campaigns. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_endomarketing.py is reusable for future regression. NOTE: the test_save_diagnosis_full test mutates the brand_0902ead1b80c diagnosis to all=4 — if you need original demo answers, reset before testing UI scoring scenarios.
